<!-- Thanks for contributing! Keep PRs focused; link the issue they address. -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? Link any related issue (e.g. "Closes #12"). -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / internal change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling

## How was this tested?

<!-- Commands you ran, manual steps, a fresh `pnpm migrate` on a clean DB, a live
     /search or /ask, etc. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm check` (Biome) passes
- [ ] I added a new numbered migration instead of editing a released one (if schema changed)
- [ ] I updated the README / CHANGELOG / `.env.example` for any behavior or config change
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or message content are committed or logged
- [ ] My commits follow Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, …)
